dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8244 IH: Neighborhood Skies Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Vindman (for himself and Mr. Beyer) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Armed Services

form.official-title: To direct the Secretary of Defense to submit to Congress an annual report on the number of Department of Defense proficiency flights occurring in the National Capitol Region.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Neighborhood Skies Act of 2026.

section.header: Annual report on proficiency flights in National Capitol Region

subsection.text: Not later than one year after the date of the enactment of this Act, and annually thereafter for each of the two subsequent years, the Secretary of Defense shall submit to Congress a report on the number of Department of Defense proficiency flights that occurred in the National Capitol Region during the 12-month period preceding the date of the submission of the report.
In this section, the term National Capitol Region has the meaning given such term in section 2655(10) of title 10, United States Code, as added by section 201.
